components.name: button
components.title: Button
components.description: Button Component A versatile button component with multiple visual variants and sizes. Inspired by shadcn/ui with CSS variable theming support.

components.name: slot
components.title: Slot
components.description: Slot Component A polymorphic component that merges its props with its child element. Inspired by @radix-ui/react-slot. This enables the `asChild` pattern used by components like Button and Badge.
